messages.text: An arrow nails through cloth and hide and pins you fast to the ground; you cannot break free to fight or flee cleanly.
An arrow pins {name} to the ground, and they thrash helplessly against it.
You wrench the pinning arrow loose and are free to move once more.
{name} tears the pinning arrow free and staggers loose.
{name} is pinned in place by an arrow, unable to move freely.
